<!--
## `METHOD /prefix/path`

**Summary:** One sentence describing what this endpoint does.

**Poker context:** Why this endpoint exists in a poker analytics system — the domain operation it enables (e.g., "Records the outcome of a completed hand, linking winner, community cards, and player hole cards for statistical analysis").

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `param_name` | string / integer | Yes | Poker-domain meaning |

<!-- Omit this section if there are no query parameters -->
### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `param_name` | string | No | null | Poker-domain meaning |

<!-- Omit Request Body section for GET/DELETE endpoints -->
### Request Body

**Schema:** `{{REQUEST_SCHEMA_NAME}}`

| Field | Type | Required | Validation | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `field_name` | string | Yes | pattern: `[A-K][SHDC]` | Card string in rank+suit notation |

**Example:**
```json
{
  "field": "value"
}
```

### Response

**Status:** `200 OK`
**Schema:** `{{RESPONSE_SCHEMA_NAME}}`

| Field | Type | Always Present | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `field_name` | string | Yes | Poker-domain meaning |

**Example:**
```json
{
  "field": "value"
}
```

### Error Responses

| Status | Condition | Response Body |
|---|---|---|
| `404 Not Found` | Resource does not exist | `{"detail": "..."}` |
| `422 Unprocessable Entity` | Request body validation failure | FastAPI default validation error |

---
